seoTitle: San Francisco Unified School District Calendar 2026-27 | Holidays & PDF
seoDescription: View the SFUSD 2026-2027 calendar verified against the official district PDF, with Aug 17 first day, Jun 2 last day, holidays, breaks, printable PDF and ICS download.
instructionalDaysDescription: The official SFUSD 2026-2027 academic calendar lists 180 total student days, with 82 fall instructional days and 98 spring instructional days.
calendarNotes: This page summarizes major student dates from the official SFUSD district-wide academic calendar. It may not include every staff work-calendar detail, professional development item, early education exception, or school-specific change.

calendarFaqs.q: When does San Francisco Unified start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: San Francisco Unified students start the 2026-2027 school year on Monday, August 17, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for SFUSD in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of spring instruction on the SFUSD 2026-2027 academic calendar is Wednesday, June 2, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is SFUSD Spring Recess in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Recess on the SFUSD 2026-2027 academic calendar runs Friday, March 26 through Friday, April 2, 2027. Students return Monday, April 5, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is SFUSD Winter Recess in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Recess runs Monday, December 21, 2026 through Friday, January 1, 2027. Students return for spring instruction on Monday, January 4, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: How many student days are in the SFUSD 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: The official SFUSD 2026-2027 academic calendar lists 180 total student days: 82 fall instructional days and 98 spring instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: Does SFUSD have school on Lunar New Year in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: No. The SFUSD 2026-2027 calendar marks Friday, February 5, 2027 as Lunar New Year Observance, with school sites and EED closed.

yearNumbers.label: Fall Instruction
yearNumbers.detail: The official SFUSD calendar lists 82 fall instructional days before Winter Recess.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Instruction
yearNumbers.detail: The official SFUSD calendar lists 98 spring instructional days after Winter Recess.

yearNumbers.label: Work-Calendar Notes
yearNumbers.detail: The official PDF combines academic calendar, work calendar, and key dates; this page focuses on major student attendance dates.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2025-2026 Calendar
content: The first day moves from August 18 in 2025-2026 to August 17 in 2026-2027.
The last day moves from June 10 in 2025-2026 to June 2 in 2026-2027.
Fall Recess moves from November 24-28 in 2025-2026 to November 23-27 in 2026-2027.
Spring Recess moves from March 27-April 3 in 2025-2026 to March 26-April 2 in 2026-2027.

customSections.label: Planning Around SFUSD Breaks
customSections.content: The 2026-2027 SFUSD academic calendar includes a full Thanksgiving week recess, a two-week Winter Recess window, and a Spring Recess that starts on Friday, March 26.

groups.label: Family planning notes
items: Fall Recess runs November 23-27, 2026, with students returning Monday, November 30.
Winter Recess runs December 21, 2026 through January 1, 2027, with spring instruction beginning Monday, January 4.
Spring Recess runs March 26-April 2, 2027, with students returning Monday, April 5.
The official PDF includes work-calendar and professional-development details that may not be student attendance days.

sourceVersion: 5-29-26 FINAL - SFUSD 2026-27 SY Academic Calendar, Work Calendar, Key Dates - Google Sheets PDF
